parameters.query: SELECT id, instance_token, status FROM uazapi_instances WHERE phone_cliente = '{{ $json.senderPhone }}' LIMIT 1

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ number: $("Normaliza").item.json.senderPhone, text: "⚠️ Você já possui uma instância cadastrada.

Use */reconectar* para gerar novo QR Code
Use */status* para verificar o status
Use */excluir* para remover e criar outra", delay: 1000 }) }}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO uazapi_instances (phone_cliente, instance_id, instance_name, instance_token, status) VALUES ('{{ $json.senderPhone }}', '{{ $json.instanceId }}', '{{ $json.instanceName }}', '{{ $json.instanceToken }}', 'disconnected') ON CONFLICT (phone_cliente) DO UPDATE SET instance_id = EXCLUDED.instance_id, instance_name = EXCLUDED.instance_name, instance_token = EXCLUDED.instance_token, status = 'disconnected'
SELECT instance_id, instance_name, instance_token, status FROM uazapi_instances WHERE phone_cliente = '{{ $('Normaliza').item.json.senderPhone }}' LIMIT 1

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ number: $("Normaliza").item.json.senderPhone, text: "❌ Nenhuma instância encontrada.\n\nUse */criar* para criar uma nova.", delay: 1000 }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ number: $json.senderPhone, text: $json.qrcode ? "📱 QR Code:\n\n" + $json.qrcode : "⚠️ QR Code indisponível. Tente novamente em instantes.", delay: 1000 }) }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ number: $("Normalize Command").item.json.senderPhone, text: "🗑️ Instância excluída com sucesso.\n\nUse */criar* se precisar de uma nova.", delay: 1000 }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ number: $("Normalize Command").item.json.senderPhone, text: "❌ Nenhuma instância encontrada para excluir.", delay: 1000 }) }}

parameters.query: SELECT instance_id, instance_name, instance_token, status, disconnected_at, disconnect_reason FROM uazapi_instances WHERE phone_cliente = '{{ $('Normaliza').item.json.senderPhone }}' LIMIT 1

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ number: $("Normalize Command").item.json.senderPhone, text: "❌ Nenhuma instância encontrada.\nUse */criar* para criar uma nova.", delay: 1000 }) }}

parameters.query: SELECT instance_id, instance_name, instance_token, phone_cliente, status FROM uazapi_instances WHERE status = 'connected'
UPDATE uazapi_instances SET status = 'disconnected', disconnected_at = NOW(), disconnect_reason = 'Detectado pelo monitor' WHERE instance_name = '{{ $json.instance_name }}' AND status = 'connected'
UPDATE uazapi_instances SET status = 'connected', disconnected_at = NULL WHERE (instance_name = '{{ $json.name }}' OR instance_token = '{{ $json.token }}') AND status != 'connected'
